document.title: File Transfer
document.summary: Applications integrate by exchanging files. The platform supports file-based integration through Connector.File.
document.implementation: Connector.File implements IConnector for file system polling, reading, and writing. Supports local and network file shares.

document.title: Shared Database
document.summary: Applications share data through a common database. Cassandra serves as the distributed shared store.
document.implementation: Storage.Cassandra provides CassandraMessageStore, deduplication, and claim-check storage accessible by all platform services.

document.title: Remote Procedure Invocation
document.summary: Applications invoke operations on remote services. The platform uses HTTP connectors for RPI-style integration.
document.implementation: Connector.Http implements IConnector for HTTP/REST API calls with retry, authentication, and circuit breaker support.

document.title: Messaging
document.summary: Applications exchange messages asynchronously through a messaging middleware. This is the core architecture of the platform.
document.implementation: The entire EnterpriseIntegrationPlatform is built around messaging — Kafka for event streams, NATS JetStream for task queues, Temporal for workflow orchestration.
